% --------------------------------------------------------- %
% DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE IF YOU DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE DOING %
% --------------------------------------------------------- %

\documentclass[]{cv}
\usepackage{graphicx} % Required for inserting images
\usepackage{pgfkeys}

\title{CV}
\author{\firstname \lastname \postnomial (\pronoun)}
\date{July 2023}

\begin{document}
% Fetch user details
\include{details}

% headers
\rhead{\header{\firstname}{\lastname}{\postnomial}{\pronoun}}

% sidebar
\sidebar{
    \section{Contact}
    \iconlink{\email}{mailto:}{envelope}
    \iconlink{\phone}{}{mobile-alt}
    \iconlink{\address}{}{map-marker-alt}
    \section{Platforms}
    \iconlink{\website}{https://}{link}
    \iconlink{\linkedinusername}{https://www.linkedin.com/in/}{linkedin}
    \iconlink{\githubusername}{https://github.com/}{github}
    \iconlink{\orcidid}{https://orcid.org/}{orcid}
    \showlanguages{languages}{Languages}{L}
    \showlanguages{planguage}{Programming}{S}
    \section{Hobbies and Interests}
    \showhobbies
}

% main content

\mainsection{
    \showcategory{briefcase}{Experience}{jobcompanies}{jobpositions}
    \showcategory{user-graduate}{Education}{educationschools}{educationcourses}
    \showcategory{id-card}{Memberships}{membership}{membershiptitle}
    \showproject{trophy}{Awards}{awards}
    \showproject{book-open}{Projects and Publications}{projects}
}

\end{document}
